title: feat: hide paid-only models from /models when user has no paid balance
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Tidying up the hive
gist.blurb: We've decluttered the API for free-tier users. Now you'll only see the models you can actually use, saving you a click and an error message.
gist.summary: The `/models` endpoint now automatically filters out paid-only models for authenticated users who don't have a paid balance.
gist.impact: Users get a streamlined, personalized list of available tools, reducing confusion about which models are accessible on their current tier.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot are organizing a wooden shelf of glowing data crystals. They are sorting them neatly, representing the curated list of models. The vibe is productive and cozy, like organizing a chest in a game.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and the monitor robot sorting glowing lime green (#ecf874) data crystals on a wooden shelf. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft pastel gradient background. The robot has a happy face on its screen. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
